---
title: "People"
---

We are recruiting at every level—see [Join us](../join.qmd) if you'd like to work with us.

## Current members

::: {.people-grid}
<div class="card h-100">
<img src="../assets/Judith-1.jpg" class="card-img-top" alt="Judith Hoeller">
<div class="card-body">
<h5 class="card-title">Judith Hoeller</h5>
<div class="member-role mb-2">Principal Investigator</div>
<p class="card-text">Judith is a theoretical and computational scientist who uses her background in mathematics and physics to study how the brain processes visual information. She earned her degrees at ETH Zurich, completed a PhD in theoretical condensed-matter physics at Yale, and moved into systems neuroscience as a postdoc at HHMI's Janelia Research Campus. Outside the lab she is usually outdoors—hiking, exploring, or swimming in lakes.</p>
<p class="card-text mb-0"><a href="mailto:jhoeller@nd.edu">Email</a> · <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=FicZM4wAAAAJ&amp;hl=en">Google Scholar</a> · <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0004-7261-4156">ORCID</a></p>
</div>
</div>
:::

<!-- To add a member, copy one whole `<div class="card h-100"> … </div>` block above and edit the photo, name, role, bio, and links. Keep every HTML tag flush to the left margin — indenting a line by 4+ spaces makes it render as literal text. -->
